title: First Amendment Accountability Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
subjects: Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
crs_summary: First Amendment Accountability Act This bill creates a new federal cause of action for the deprivation of any rights, privileges, or immunities secured by the First Amendment by a federal employee acting under color of any statute, ordinance, custom, or usage of the United States. The term federal employee means an individual, other than the President or Vice President, who occupies a position in the Executive Branch.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
